programme.sub-title: S01 : E51 WOF 2023 #51: Winter Games New Zealand - Big Air Team Challenge
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge besuchen wir die aufregenden Winterspiele 2023 mit der Big Air Team Challenge! Seien Sie dabei, wenn die Freestyle-Skifahrer und Snowboarder ihr Können auf spektakuläre Weise unter Beweis stellen!

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup - Sal (CPV)
programme.desc: Sal is the venue for the GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024, where the best wingfoilers in the world will meet for an exciting competition. This paradise in Cape Verde is known for its strong winds and rolling Atlantic waves.

programme.title: Copa Kitely GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024 - Ibiraquera (BRA)
programme.desc: Ibiraquera is the venue for the GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024, where the world's best wingfoilers will meet. With its constant winds and breathtaking coastline, this Brazilian hotspot provides the perfect backdrop for exciting races.

programme.title: Copa Kitely GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024 - Jericoacoara (BRA)
programme.desc: The Copa Kitely GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024 will take place in Jericoacoara, where the world's best wingfoilers will compete against each other. With its legendary winds, this Brazilian jewel offers ideal conditions for high-speed racing.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
programme.desc: The World’s Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we’ve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they’ll be going all out against each other. It’s now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let’s start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4 - Holland
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5 - Holland 2023
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E06 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E07 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E08 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8 - Portugal
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E09 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9 - England
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E10 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
programme.desc: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E11 Stage 11 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E12 Stage 12 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E13 Stage 13 - SCL Cyprus 2023
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E14 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14 - South Africa
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E15 Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E16 Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Stage 1 - FINLAND – ICEMAN
programme.desc: After 10 years there is another edition of THE ICEMAN in minus 25 degrees and snow, and it is also the first stage in the MLO Strongman Champions League. With a new World champion from South Africa, Rayno Nel, it will be a challenging year for all the athletes to win the title again after 1 full year. But now they can win one very exceptional title, which is the SCL ICEMAN!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Stage 2 - MARTINIQUE - 2024
programme.desc: A battle in the beautiful Caribbean Islands. Over 2 days and more than 10,000 spectators expected like previous editions. The cold temperature from the Iceman is changed in 35 degrees hot Martinique. Watch who gets the title in Martinique, events include: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Hercules Hold, Log Lift, and Arm Over Arm Pull.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Stage 3 - HUNGARY - 2024
programme.desc: The SCL Hungary this year is in the AQUAPARK in Budapest, Stage 3 from the spectacular MLO Strongman Champions League, World is Biggest Pro League. With five great events, such as: Viking Press, Farmer's Walk, Deadlift, Conan's Wheel, and A loading race with Beer barrels of 200 Kg. It is a must see!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Stage 4 - SERBIA - 2024
programme.desc: We're in Zrenjanin, Serbia, again a fantastic stage in the SCL WORLD SERIES TOUR 2024, five events including a super human Yoke race. Who will be the yellow leader for the coming season and take the title with 25 championship points?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Stage 5 - HOLLAND - 2024 - Part 1
programme.desc: We're in Groenlo, east of Holland With the new Talent from South Africa and 2025 Strongest Man of the World - Rayno Nel. The first 3 events are Truckpull, Log Lift and Loading race. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it is the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Stage 6 - HOLLAND - 2024 - Part 2
programme.desc: SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it is about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland , continues with the last 3 events, here at the venue in Groenlo. The events in this episode are the Conan Wheel, Farmers Walk and the Atlas Stones, with a brutal 200kg stone at the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E07 Stage 7 - FINLAND - 2024 - World record breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League: World Record Breakers 2024 kicks off with the Truck Pull, followed by the Front Hold, Frame Carry, Tractor Pull, Shield Carry, Sandbag Toss, and concludes with the intense Loading Race. This two-day competition features all the top strongmen from Finland-and it's one for the history books. Three new world records are shattered, making this a must-see episode for...

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E08 Stage 8 - ESTONIA - 2024
programme.desc: For the first time in over 10 years back in Estonia, in Tartu. 12 of the Strongest athletes in the world will fight here for the title and the overall world championship points. You will see 5 crazy events, such as: Boat Pull, Viking Press, Medley, Conan's Wheel and a very heavy Power Stairs!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E09 Stage 9 - PORTUGAL - 2024
programme.desc: We have returned to Portugal, at the beach of Eposende, to bring you EUROPE'S STRONGEST LATINO. In the beautiful sun of Portugal five cruel events are done in this heat: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Log Lift, Sandbag Toss, Medley.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E10 Stage 10 - POLAND - 2024
programme.desc: A spectacular event on the beach of Gdansk, Poland. A competition in the sand and in the water. Complete with a boat pull. With an impressive line up again, we welcome you to watch us LIVE in the SCL Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E11 Stage 11 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 1
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League Train stops in Dubai again for the 3rd time, and is now bigger than ever. Hafthor Bjornsson makes his come back here at the SCL DUBAI. You simply cannot miss this most epic show at the World Trade Center in Dubai part 1.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E12 Stage 12 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 2
programme.desc: After three cruel events in part 1, the World record holder on the deadlift with 501 Kg, will fight for the crown and the title. You simply cant miss this most epic show, at in the World Trade Center in Dubai part 2.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E13 Stage 13 - CYPRUS - 2024
programme.desc: Superhumans arrive in Limassol. Great strongmen from all over the world will compete in the Old Port of Limassol , for the title and championship points. More than ever important this stage, as we come so close to the World Finals in Turkey this year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E14 Stage 14 - SOUTH AFRICA - 2024
programme.desc: With 12 of the world's best athletes arriving in Cape Town, South Africa, all fighting for the crown and final ranking points ahead of the World Finals in Turkey. Rayno Nel still needs to qualify along with Brian Kichton also battling for a seat in the World Finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E15 Stage 15 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 1
programme.desc: This episode contestants fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever. Twelve finalists from all over the world are in Turkey and will fight for the ultimate title: WORLD CHAMPION 2024.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E16 Stage 16 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of the world final of the Strongman Champions League tour 2024 in Alanya, Turkey. With three Events down and amazing results. Who will be the new World champion?

programme.desc: SCL returns to Poland with 12 athletes all battling for the number one title

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 10, Hungary
programme.desc: The 10th stage takes place in Hungary and features new super talent!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 11, Zambia
programme.desc: The first ever SCL in Zambia! The athletes get to take in some of the stunning sights and go on to do events such as Tyre Flip and Log Lift

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 12, Romania
programme.desc: The competition moves to Romania and for the first time this season the athletes compete in rainy conditions which make the events even tougher

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 13, Lithunia
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition takes place in Lithunia and world records are once again broken!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 14, Estonia
programme.desc: Episode 14 takes place in Estonia where drama and world records will be seen again

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 15, Malaysia (World Finals Part 1)
programme.desc: Taking place over 2 days in Malaysia, this is part 1 of the world finals of Strongman Champions League!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 16, Malaysia (World Finals Part 2)
programme.desc: Who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League - we find out who is crowned as world champion today in the second part of the final epsiode

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015. Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The second stage of Strongman champions league will be hosted in Germany, by FIBO - the leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health worldwide with 300,000 visitors in four days. Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 3, Holland
programme.desc: Holland is hosting 12 different countries with 14 of the strongest men in the world for the third stage of the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 4, Finland
programme.desc: Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on earth is in this competition which has attracted the attention of the audience in the battle for the title of strongest man in Finland. The next round of SCL is in Bulgaria.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 5, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 6, Latvia
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 7, Croatia
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 8, Poland
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 9, Austria
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 10, Romania
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 12, Lithuania
programme.desc: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 13, Portugal
programme.desc: The 13th stage of Strongman Champions League is in Maia, Portugal. The competition is at the “Powerexpo” – one of the best sport and fitness events in Portugal.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 14, Martinique
programme.desc: This stage is in Martinique and eight strongmen from all over the world will compete for the last chance to gather points before the world grand finals in December.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: A special World championship under the newcomers and lightweights in the Strongman world. Some of them will step from this to the heavyweights divisions.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E16 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey
programme.desc: After 15 outstanding competitions all over the world, finally we are here at the final competition of this year’s Strongman Champions League hosted in Turkey.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking
programme.desc: Welcome to the land of Vikings - Norway - to the first stage of the SCL World Series 2016

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The second stage of the SCL heads to the FIBO convention, Cologne. The leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health hosts.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship
programme.desc: For the third stage of SCL world series 2016, the athletes compete in Kaunas for the SCL Log Lift World Championships.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 4, Holland
programme.desc: Stage four is an epic competition and a few surprises. With 14 strongmen from all over the world, one newcomer left quite an impression.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 5, Latvia
programme.desc: This year Lauri Nami joins the starting list, back after last year's injury in Romania

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E03 GLORY 107 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (45-6-2, 23 KO) will step up in weight to challenge GLORY middleweight world champion Donovan Wisse (23-1, 10 KO) in the main event of GLORY 107. In the co-main event, giants Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (30-5-1, 17 KO) and Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (26-11, 4 KO) will square off in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S15 : E04 GLORY 108: Last FW Standing Finals
programme.desc: What began with twenty-four of the world’s top featherweights is now down to the final four as they battle in a one-night tournament to crown the Last Featherweight Standing.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S15 : E05 COLLISION 9
programme.desc: GLORY heavyweight world champion Mory Kromah (37-3-1, 21 KO) defends his title against Serbian sensation Milos Cvjeticanin (19-5, 10 KO), Croatian superstar Antonio Plazibat (23-5, 16 KO) faces Belgian Moroccan Anis Bouzid (49-5, 37 KO) and the GLORY light heavyweight grand prix plays out in full, deciding the next GLORY light heavyweight world champion.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E03 GLORY 107 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (45-6-2, 23 KO) will step up in weight to challenge GLORY middleweight world champion Donovan Wisse (23-1, 10 KO) in the main event of GLORY 107. In the co-main event, giants Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (30-5-1, 17 KO) and Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (26-11, 4 KO) will square off in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S15 : E05 COLLISION 9
programme.desc: GLORY heavyweight world champion Mory Kromah (37-3-1, 21 KO) defends his title against Serbian sensation Milos Cvjeticanin (19-5, 10 KO), Croatian superstar Antonio Plazibat (23-5, 16 KO) faces Belgian Moroccan Anis Bouzid (49-5, 37 KO) and the GLORY light heavyweight grand prix plays out in full, deciding the next GLORY light heavyweight world champion.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E08 GLORY 103 Rotterdam LHS
programme.desc: GLORY 103: Last Heavyweight Standing main event features Levi Rigters (19-3, 9 KO) colliding with Jamal Ben Saddik (38-10, 29 KO) to see who moves on in the tournament. Among the other names taking part in Phase Two are Nabil Khachab (29-6-1, 4 KO), Iancu Ionut (31-11, 13 KO), Rade Opacic (21-7, 16 KO), Milos Cvjeticanin (13-4, 9 KO), Sofian Laidouni (39-5-1, 20 KO), and many more. In addition, Chico Kwasi (44-5-2, 23 KO) will defend his GLORY welterweight world title against Mehdi Ait El Hadj (35-4-2, 8 KO), Mory Kromah (34-3-1, 20 KO) returns and takes on Cristian Ristea (44-26, 13 KO) in a heavyweight match-up outside the tournament, and Tayfun Ozcan (88-11-3, 28 KO) clashes with rival Don Sno (6-2, 3 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E08 GLORY 104 Rotterdam
programme.desc: Former Light Heavyweight Champion Tarik Khbabez (52-12-1, 22 KO) and Bahram Rajabzabeh (72-5, 63 KO) collide in a huge showdown for the vacant Light Heavyweight title. The penultimate round of the Last Heavyweight Standing tournament resumes with eight heavyweights competing in two separate four-man one-night tournaments. Notable participants include Levi Rigters (20-3, 10 KO), Nabil Khachab (30-6-1, 4 KO), Rade Opacic (22-7, 17 KO) and Milos Cvjeticanin (14-4, 9 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing

programme.desc: GLORY 100 features four GLORY world title bouts, four separate four-man one-night tournaments to determine who qualifies for the Last Heavyweight Standing finals, and several key matchups involving some of GLORY’s most popular fighters.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. With top match making throughout the fight cards, they have been touted as some of the biggest and toughest fights in the UK. Shock N Awe consistently delivers hard hitting action, also going one step further by adding in the personalities from MC Ricky Wright, Ring Girls Poppy and Alex and as well as the huge UK fight teams!

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: In a showdown between the winners from Series 1 and the powerhouse Russian Red Devils, Mario Rinaldi is in tough against Sergey Kaznovski. The Russian is reknowned for short, brutal fights, earning him a reputation as the king of the 1st round KO. This is not the first time Trevor Pragley and Andrei Semenov have met in the ring. Last time, Semenov was battered into submission, so he come into this fight hungry for revenge.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 FIGHT VAULT

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Gary Vig as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Dean Schmeichel has been coaching for over 20 years. Despite the allure of working as a full time wrestling coach in the martial arts industry, he has instead dedicated himself to work with kids and coaching school sports. Wrestling continues to be an interal part of Dean's life, and he finds the most satisfaction in helping athletes to understand and fall in love with the sport, as he did.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: CJ Hollett is a Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Black Belt who loves teaching his craft. He is very well respected as an MMA coach for his technical mindset, high level skills and experience coaching UFC fighters. CJ loves working with MMA fighters because of their hunger to win, and believes it's time for Jiu Jitsu to make a resurgence in the MMA cage.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Fabricio Santos De Jesus was introduced to Judo as a child while he was still living in Brazil. He was also introduced to Capoeira, becoming Champion of Brazil and International Capoeira Champion. He has been able to transfer his knowledge of the control of movement and is now recognized for this knowledge as a coach in MMA community. Hard Knocks Fighter Jess Elverum, among others, using his teachings to expand their flexibility and dexterity, becoming more fluid and calm in movement.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Josh Lee is highly respected in the MMA community for his wrestling skills. In this episode, we follow Josh throughout his day, and see some well known HK fighters who have trained under him, such as Jess Elverum. It is Josh's hope that his ability to transfer his knowledge of wrestling will make big difference in his students' fighting. He would also love to see more people take up wrestling.

programme.title: A Look Back: 1994 FIFA World Cup USA™
programme.desc: Brazil Highlights in the 1994 FIFA World Cup USA™

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E45 50 Years Corvette Stingray
programme.desc: 1963 saw the launch of the Chevrolet Corvette Stingray, the brand's answer to established sports car models by Jaguar, Maserati and others. Many consider it to be the most exciting sports car of all time. We pay tribute to this classic.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E34 The Advantages of All-wheel Drive
programme.desc: We took the all-wheel model of the Mazda CX-5 off the road in order to test its terrain capabilities. In addition: what does the third generation of BMW's so-called SAV X5 have to offer? And: Kia's compact SUV, the Sportage.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E60 Typically German
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E116 Open-Top Sportscars
programme.desc: The Audi R8 V10 Spyder's design and sophisticated technology was meant to set an example for what a car manufacturer is capable of. In addition: the Wiesmann Roadster MF5. And: Porsche's house tuner Ruf turned up the volume with their RT 35 model.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E118 Batman's Dreams: Supercars in Acceleration
programme.desc: The clash of the convertibles, the Nissan 370 Z in comparison to Porsche's Boxster S. Also: the exclusive one-off high-performance sports car Maybach Exelero. And: a dream of a sports car, a vehicle of superlatives, the Bugatti Veyron Vitesse.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E129 Jaguar F-Type
programme.desc: Jaguar found their way back to the world of sports cars. The F-Type is able to take on the competition like the BMW Z4. We also took a closer look at two other competitors, the Porsche Boxster S and Nissan's 370 Z.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 The Ten Most Fuel-efficient Cars
programme.desc: Not everyone can afford to pay vast sums of money for fuel. We present our top 10 most economical cars in terms of fuel consumption.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 The Best Beastly Car Names
programme.desc: Car models are named after all sorts of things, from countries to ancient deities to animals. We take a look at the top 10 cars named after animals.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 The Ambulance
programme.desc: Stunt coordinator Domi’s latest idea for the Stunt Heroes team involves an old ambulance that is prepared so that the stuntman can jump right through the ambulance with his car.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 The Pile-Up
programme.desc: Fog, darkness and a pileup involving multiple cars, the Stunt Heroes want to recreate such a scene as part of a stunt with burning people, a fireman who arrives late at the scene and a car that flies through the air.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E173 Maserati Ghibli
programme.desc: With the Ghibli, Maserati advanced into a more affordable market segment. But the competition is strong. In addition: taking the Maserati GranCabrio MC on a cruise through the Alps.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E129 Jaguar F-Type
programme.desc: Jaguar found their way back to the world of sports cars. The F-Type is able to take on the competition like the BMW Z4. We also took a closer look at two other competitors, the Porsche Boxster S and Nissan's 370 Z.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 The Most Beautiful Vintage Cars
programme.desc: There are classic cars that are undisputed beauties when it comes to design and look. We take a look at our top 10 most beautiful classic cars.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 The Most Successful Cars in the 24h Race
programme.desc: 24-hour races are one of the toughest tests for man and machine in motor racing. We present the most successful cars in this racing category in our Top 10 list.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E94 Audi at Le Mans
programme.desc: At the 2012 Le Mans 24 Hours, Audi entered the R18 e-tron quattro for the first time. Also: the Porsche Cayenne GTS, the model between the S and the Turbo. And: the Mercedes-Benz CLS Shooting Brake.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E117 Million-Dollar Toys from the Middle East
programme.desc: The McLaren MP4 12C Spider, one of many high-performance sports cars featured at the Doha Motor Show in Qatar. Also: the creations of manufacturers like Lamborghini, Bertone or Porsche but also the first Arab super sports car, the Lykan HyperSport.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E104 Lamborghini
programme.desc: Sant'Agata Bolognese, the home of the iconic Italian sports car manufacturer Lamborghini, is the perfect place to take a look under the hood of the different Gallardo models. Also: cruising through Rome in an Aventador LP700-4.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E151 Power Packs With Space
programme.desc: Jaguar's supercharged V8 XF RS Sportbreak, the Porsche Panamera Turbo S and the Audi S8 combine space and comfort with the performance of a sports car. We compare these three contenders.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Porsche Special
programme.desc: Porsche is a world-famous brand and a household name when it comes to sports cars. For over 70 years fans have been attracted to Porsche automobiles. But when was the big rise of the brand and when was their first car created?

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E66 Space Savers
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Samba transforms from pack mule into high-priced classic. And: a former letter box with 37 seats. The 1962 'Graf and Stift' post bus now takes tourists to their hotel.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Changing the model
programme.desc: BMW got into the electric mobility business with their ActiveE and i3 models. We visited the company's technology office in Silicon Valley. Also: the Stuck brothers at the test track with the Mercedes C 63 AMG. And: the Audi A3 Sportback.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E52 The big journey
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG E63 S is a wolf in sheep's clothing. This station wagon has more power than the Nissan GTR 'Godzilla'. Also: the Porsche Panamera GTS feels at home on the motorway and on the race track. And: Audi's powerful all-purpose executive car RS6.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pikes Peak
programme.desc: The Pikes Peak Hill Climb is a rather unique type of car race in the mountains of Colorado, USA. It's exciting, tough and dangerous, and in 1987, two-time world rally champion Walter Roehrl took his Audi Sport Quattro S1 to the top.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Rally Sport 1983
programme.desc: In 1983 Audi introduced the Quattro 4x4 drive to the rally world, adding a new dimension to rally racing. The races became tougher and more brutal. The strain on drivers, vehicles and mechanics alike was extremely intense.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Scrapyard Gold
programme.desc: It is not too unusual to find hidden gems of automotive history in a perfect condition in barns or scrap yards. Also: the MGC GT Sebring, that was built for the 12 Hours of Sebring race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E47 British Sportscar Rarities
programme.desc: In the early 20th century people used to travel in vehicles like the Morgan Threewheeler, a mixture between motorcycle and car, thus avoiding the British tax on cars. We got hold of a 1936 Morgan Threewheeler and went for a ride.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Le Mans 1952
programme.desc: The year 1952 saw several premieres at the legendary 24-hour endurance race of Le Mans. After 22 years Mercedes-Benz returned to the famous circuit, and Ferrari started to use factory works team cars for the first time.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 German Touring Car Championship 1992
programme.desc: The Deutsche Tourenwagen Meisterschaft was one of the most important racing series in German motorsports. It was difficult, tough and well-known for its die-hard battles between the international competitors. We present the highlights of the 1992 race.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Ferry Porsche
programme.desc: After the Second World War, following in his father's footsteps who had been responsible for the development of the classic Volkswagen, Ferry Porsche laid the foundation for the brand's sports car models like the 356 and later the Porsche 911.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Walter Röhrl
programme.desc: One cannot talk about rally sports without mentioning the name Walter Röhrl. From an early age, Röhrl showed his talent in rally sports and won the European, World and other international rally championships several times in his career.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Audi Quattro - Triumph of an Idea, 1980
programme.desc: With the launch of the four-wheel drive 4WD in 1980, Audi changed the rally world. The company's advanced engineering not only improved the handling of the rally cars, but also confronted the drivers with new challenges.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Amphicar 770
programme.desc: The Amphicar 770 is a rare classic and a unique vehicle. It may not be the fastest car on the street, but it’s ready to be used on the water as well and drives like a motorboat.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 MG TC
programme.desc: The MG TC is a sporty, but also extremely spartan car with technology from the late 1940s. We accompanied the owner of a MG TC on his way to pass the TÜV, the German technical certification test.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E62 Auction Classics
programme.desc: Nowadays the gull-winged classic DeLorean is an automotive investment. Also: 100 dream cars under the hammer at a classic car auction in Switzerland. And: modern classics with investment potential like the Mercedes 190E 2.3 16V.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E41 Vintage Cars Worldwide
programme.desc: In Thailand a Mercedes 190 SL and other souped-up classics take part in the Bangkok Classic Car Ride. Plus: an Oldsmobile convertible on Venezuela's most beautiful island. And: classic cars from the US as a tourist attraction in Cuba.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Animal-like Cars
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Dean Malay put the Hollywood appeal of the Volkswagen Beetle Convertible to the test. Also: at the BMW Design Night the Bavarian manufacturer showcased its newest creations. And: the Stuck brothers with the Lexus IS-F at the test track.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 To the Top!
programme.desc: The Audi Sport Quattro S1 was a rally legend. We checked how the company's series vehicle A1 Quattro fares in comparison. Also: the Stuck brothers take the Ford Focus ST to the test track. And: the spacey, but cute electric microcar Renault Twizy.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Pickups
programme.desc: In Europe pickups are mainly used commercially. In the US these trucks are as common as SUVs. We compared the Volkswagen Amarok to the Toyota Hilux. Also: current US pickups, the Chevrolet Colorado and GMC's Sierra and Canyon.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Tuned SUVs
programme.desc: SUVs usually are rather impressive right out of the factory, but there are many tuning and customizing options. In this episode we present Kelleners BMW X5, the Mercedes Brabus B63 and the Porsche Cayenne tuned by Techart.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Eurocopter
programme.desc: The Eurocopter EC 135 is the most successful and best-selling helicopter in the world and a multi-talent. Whether as a VIP shuttle, in air rescue or for the police. This all-rounder is even used for military tasks.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Unimog
programme.desc: It is a synonym and a touchstone for four-wheel drive movement. It is the symbol for quality of commercial vehicle constructions worldwide. Mercedes-Benz manufactured for the 60th birthday a new Unimog.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ferruccio Lamborghini
programme.desc: In 1964, Ferruccio Lamborghini set himself the goal to build the best sports cars in the world, a bold move, being located only a few kilometers from Ferrari.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Alois Ruf
programme.desc: Alois Ruf is the founder of a small, but well-known car manufacturing company in Bavaria that specialises in building their own vision of street legal super sports cars on the foundation of Porsche bodys.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 Offroad Minis
programme.desc: Small 4x4's are on the rise, as it doesn't need to be size that matters when it comes to having fun in the city or off-road. We take a look at mini SUVs, the Fiat's 500 X, the Cross Polo and Cross up! by Volkswagen and BMW's X1 XDrive.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Land Rover Special
programme.desc: The Land Rover Defender is one of the oldest offroad car models. We took a look at this iconic vehicle and 70 years of Land Rover history. Also: we took the Range Rover Evoque, the most recent model of the British brand, to the legendary Silk Road.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E47 Close to the ground
programme.desc: In their 4 series BMW took into account that sporty vehicles need a low center of gravity. In the manufacturer's range of vehicles this model is closest to the asphalt. We compared the BMW 435i and Porsche's Cayman S and took a look at the Alfa Romeo 4C.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E49 Athletes on stilts - Power SUVs
programme.desc: Since the rising popularity of SUVs compact models have become a new trend, so the manufacturers started offering more models and pushing their performance. We took a look at the competitors Audi RS Q3, Mercedes-AMG GLA 45 and Porsche Macan Turbo.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Stereotypes on Two Wheels
programme.desc: Scooters, stereotypes on two wheels? It doesn't always have to be a classic Vespa! We take a look at three alternatives: Kymco's big scooter xciting 500 i that feels like riding on a sofa, Piaggio's three-wheeler MP3 500 with two front wheels that promises more dynamic driving pleasure and the powerful electric scooter e-max from China.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 Trikes
programme.desc: Whether taking it easy and cruising, or firing it up and drifting - trikes, scooters and three-wheeled bike conversions all have their own charm and driving dynamics, especially the trikes. We take a closer look at four rather exotic motorcycles: the Rewaco RF1 Turbo, Piaggio's MP3 and bike conversions for the Suzuki 800 Intruder and the Triumph Rocket III Touring.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E152 La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: With the Alfieri, Maserati in 2014 celebrated their anniversary with the introduction of a beautiful grand tourer. In remembrance and as part of the three-day celebration, Maserati organised a cruise from Bologna to Torino with some of their most iconic cars.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Fiat Dino
programme.desc: The Fiat Dino Spider is one of the most beautiful cabriolets of the 1960s. Its impeccable design was created by Pininfarina, and only 525 units were built. Under its hood growls a Ferrari V6 engine.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E45 50 Years Corvette Stingray
programme.desc: 1963 saw the launch of the Chevrolet Corvette Stingray, the brand's answer to established sports car models by Jaguar, Maserati and others. Many consider it to be the most exciting sports car of all time. We pay tribute to this classic.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E34 The Advantages of All-wheel Drive
programme.desc: We took the all-wheel model of the Mazda CX-5 off the road in order to test its terrain capabilities. In addition: what does the third generation of BMW's so-called SAV X5 have to offer? And: Kia's compact SUV, the Sportage.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E60 Typically German
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E118 Batman's Dreams: Supercars in Acceleration
programme.desc: The clash of the convertibles, the Nissan 370 Z in comparison to Porsche's Boxster S. Also: the exclusive one-off high-performance sports car Maybach Exelero. And: a dream of a sports car, a vehicle of superlatives, the Bugatti Veyron Vitesse.

programme.sub-title: S02 : E129 Jaguar F-Type
programme.desc: Jaguar found their way back to the world of sports cars. The F-Type is able to take on the competition like the BMW Z4. We also took a closer look at two other competitors, the Porsche Boxster S and Nissan's 370 Z.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 The Ten Most Fuel-efficient Cars
programme.desc: Not everyone can afford to pay vast sums of money for fuel. We present our top 10 most economical cars in terms of fuel consumption.

programme.desc: With the Ghibli, Maserati advanced into a more affordable market segment. But the competition is strong. In addition: taking the Maserati GranCabrio MC on a cruise through the Alps.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 The Most Beautiful Vintage Cars
programme.desc: There are classic cars that are undisputed beauties when it comes to design and look. We take a look at our top 10 most beautiful classic cars.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 The Most Successful Cars in the 24h Race
programme.desc: 24-hour races are one of the toughest tests for man and machine in motor racing. We present the most successful cars in this racing category in our Top 10 list.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E117 Million-Dollar Toys from the Middle East
programme.desc: The McLaren MP4 12C Spider, one of many high-performance sports cars featured at the Doha Motor Show in Qatar. Also: the creations of manufacturers like Lamborghini, Bertone or Porsche but also the first Arab super sports car, the Lykan HyperSport.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E94 Audi at Le Mans
programme.desc: At the 2012 Le Mans 24 Hours, Audi entered the R18 e-tron quattro for the first time. Also: the Porsche Cayenne GTS, the model between the S and the Turbo. And: the Mercedes-Benz CLS Shooting Brake.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E54 Sporty Fords
programme.desc: The 1955 Ford Thunderbird is part of Henry Ford's motorsports legacy. In addition: the Ford Capri from the May car tuning company is as fast as a 1970s Porsche. And: the Ford Mustang, the progenitor of the so-called pony car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E104 Lamborghini
programme.desc: Sant'Agata Bolognese, the home of the iconic Italian sports car manufacturer Lamborghini, is the perfect place to take a look under the hood of the different Gallardo models. Also: cruising through Rome in an Aventador LP700-4.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Scrapyard Gold
programme.desc: It is not too unusual to find hidden gems of automotive history in a perfect condition in barns or scrap yards. Also: the MGC GT Sebring, that was built for the 12 Hours of Sebring race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E71 Mobility in Eastern Europe
programme.desc: In the 1950s, companies like Tatra from Czechoslovakia introduced advanced, even pioneering automobiles. The clientele was exclusive, which is why now these streamlined cars are big rarities. We tracked down the owner of a 1937 Tatra T87.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E51 Open Air Concert
programme.desc: As an homage to driving top-down we took a look at three of the most beautiful convertibles. The animalistic sound of the Audi S3 convertible's 4-cylinder is astonishing. But what about the Nissan 370 Z Roadster? Or Porsche's Boxster GTS?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Topless on the road
programme.desc: Convertibles suggest to the feeling of freedom while driving a car. We took a look at what Opel's Cascada and Adam convertible models had to offer. Also: what does the BMW 3 series Gran Turismo have in common with its bigger brother from the 5 series?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E124 Special: 24h of Le Mans - Track Days
programme.desc: Two weeks before the start of the 24 hours of Le Mans, all teams are busy testing their cars on the traditional long distance track in France. Bad weather, accidents and a lot of tension, we documented the official test days in 2013.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E190 V8 Power
programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Episode 12
programme.desc: Once again it was time for the VLN Endurance Racing Championship. While the drivers were doing their test laps, we had a look behind the scenes and explored what went on in the pit lanes.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Episode 16
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Chevy Camaro vs Mercedes SLS AMG
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi invite car freaks from the Middle East to show off their souped-up vehicles on the "Walk" at Jumeirah Beach in Dubai. In this episode, a Chevrolet Camaro competes against a Mercedes SLS AMG.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 BMW X5 vs Mercedes SLK 230
programme.desc: If you like souped-up and luxuriously equipped vehicles, Jumeirah Beach in Dubai is the place to be. There, the cars are judged and there is also something to win. This episode features a BMW X5 and a Mercedes SLK 230.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E160 Road Stars
programme.desc: The Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse in Austria is the ideal playground for the lightweight power packs Lotus Elise and Roding Roadster. Also: the elegant but still very powerful Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E106 Porsche to the Max
programme.desc: The Techart Grand GT by Porsche's house tuner is a souped-up Panamera. But the off-the-shelf GTS model also has its treats. Patrick Simon took this monster to the track. In addition: Ruf's anniversary model RT 35. And: the 911 Carrera 4.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 BMW X6M vs Nissan Patrol
programme.desc: At Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, car owners can have their souped-up vehicles judged in three categories and win an overnight stay at the Sofitel Hotel. This time, a BMW X6M, a Ford F250 and a Nissan Patrol are in the running.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Nova SS vs Honda Accord
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Episode 15
programme.desc: We present the highlights of last week. The 24 hour race was exciting, as usual. In addition, we explored the 'Strong Man Run' and took a look at the tourist drivers

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Episode 12
programme.desc: Once again it was time for the VLN Endurance Racing Championship. While the drivers were doing their test laps, we had a look behind the scenes and explored what went on in the pit lanes.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Porsche Special
programme.desc: Porsche is a world-famous brand and a household name when it comes to sports cars. For over 70 years fans have been attracted to Porsche automobiles. But when was the big rise of the brand and when was their first car created?

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E66 Space Savers
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Samba transforms from pack mule into high-priced classic. And: a former letter box with 37 seats. The 1962 'Graf and Stift' post bus now takes tourists to their hotel.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Changing the model
programme.desc: BMW got into the electric mobility business with their ActiveE and i3 models. We visited the company's technology office in Silicon Valley. Also: the Stuck brothers at the test track with the Mercedes C 63 AMG. And: the Audi A3 Sportback.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E52 The big journey
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG E63 S is a wolf in sheep's clothing. This station wagon has more power than the Nissan GTR 'Godzilla'. Also: the Porsche Panamera GTS feels at home on the motorway and on the race track. And: Audi's powerful all-purpose executive car RS6.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pikes Peak
programme.desc: The Pikes Peak Hill Climb is a rather unique type of car race in the mountains of Colorado, USA. It's exciting, tough and dangerous, and in 1987, two-time world rally champion Walter Roehrl took his Audi Sport Quattro S1 to the top.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Rally Sport 1983
programme.desc: In 1983 Audi introduced the Quattro 4x4 drive to the rally world, adding a new dimension to rally racing. The races became tougher and more brutal. The strain on drivers, vehicles and mechanics alike was extremely intense.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Scrapyard Gold
programme.desc: It is not too unusual to find hidden gems of automotive history in a perfect condition in barns or scrap yards. Also: the MGC GT Sebring, that was built for the 12 Hours of Sebring race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E47 British Sportscar Rarities
programme.desc: In the early 20th century people used to travel in vehicles like the Morgan Threewheeler, a mixture between motorcycle and car, thus avoiding the British tax on cars. We got hold of a 1936 Morgan Threewheeler and went for a ride.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Le Mans 1952
programme.desc: The year 1952 saw several premieres at the legendary 24-hour endurance race of Le Mans. After 22 years Mercedes-Benz returned to the famous circuit, and Ferrari started to use factory works team cars for the first time.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ferruccio Lamborghini
programme.desc: In 1964, Ferruccio Lamborghini set himself the goal to build the best sports cars in the world, a bold move, being located only a few kilometers from Ferrari.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Walter Röhrl
programme.desc: One cannot talk about rally sports without mentioning the name Walter Röhrl. From an early age, Röhrl showed his talent in rally sports and won the European, World and other international rally championships several times in his career.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 German Touring Car Championship 1992
programme.desc: The Deutsche Tourenwagen Meisterschaft was one of the most important racing series in German motorsports. It was difficult, tough and well-known for its die-hard battles between the international competitors. We present the highlights of the 1992 race.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Audi Quattro - Triumph of an Idea, 1980
programme.desc: With the launch of the four-wheel drive 4WD in 1980, Audi changed the rally world. The company's advanced engineering not only improved the handling of the rally cars, but also confronted the drivers with new challenges.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Amphicar 770
programme.desc: The Amphicar 770 is a rare classic and a unique vehicle. It may not be the fastest car on the street, but it’s ready to be used on the water as well and drives like a motorboat.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 MG TC
programme.desc: The MG TC is a sporty, but also extremely spartan car with technology from the late 1940s. We accompanied the owner of a MG TC on his way to pass the TÜV, the German technical certification test.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E62 Auction Classics
programme.desc: Nowadays the gull-winged classic DeLorean is an automotive investment. Also: 100 dream cars under the hammer at a classic car auction in Switzerland. And: modern classics with investment potential like the Mercedes 190E 2.3 16V.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E41 Vintage Cars Worldwide
programme.desc: In Thailand a Mercedes 190 SL and other souped-up classics take part in the Bangkok Classic Car Ride. Plus: an Oldsmobile convertible on Venezuela's most beautiful island. And: classic cars from the US as a tourist attraction in Cuba.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Animal-like Cars
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Dean Malay put the Hollywood appeal of the Volkswagen Beetle Convertible to the test. Also: at the BMW Design Night the Bavarian manufacturer showcased its newest creations. And: the Stuck brothers with the Lexus IS-F at the test track.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 To the Top!
programme.desc: The Audi Sport Quattro S1 was a rally legend. We checked how the company's series vehicle A1 Quattro fares in comparison. Also: the Stuck brothers take the Ford Focus ST to the test track. And: the spacey, but cute electric microcar Renault Twizy.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Pickups
programme.desc: In Europe pickups are mainly used commercially. In the US these trucks are as common as SUVs. We compared the Volkswagen Amarok to the Toyota Hilux. Also: current US pickups, the Chevrolet Colorado and GMC's Sierra and Canyon.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Tuned SUVs
programme.desc: SUVs usually are rather impressive right out of the factory, but there are many tuning and customizing options. In this episode we present Kelleners BMW X5, the Mercedes Brabus B63 and the Porsche Cayenne tuned by Techart.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Eurocopter
programme.desc: The Eurocopter EC 135 is the most successful and best-selling helicopter in the world and a multi-talent. Whether as a VIP shuttle, in air rescue or for the police. This all-rounder is even used for military tasks.

programme.title: Made in ...
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Unimog
programme.desc: It is a synonym and a touchstone for four-wheel drive movement. It is the symbol for quality of commercial vehicle constructions worldwide. Mercedes-Benz manufactured for the 60th birthday a new Unimog.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ferruccio Lamborghini
programme.desc: In 1964, Ferruccio Lamborghini set himself the goal to build the best sports cars in the world, a bold move, being located only a few kilometers from Ferrari.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Alois Ruf
programme.desc: Alois Ruf is the founder of a small, but well-known car manufacturing company in Bavaria that specialises in building their own vision of street legal super sports cars on the foundation of Porsche bodys.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 Offroad Minis
programme.desc: Small 4x4's are on the rise, as it doesn't need to be size that matters when it comes to having fun in the city or off-road. We take a look at mini SUVs, the Fiat's 500 X, the Cross Polo and Cross up! by Volkswagen and BMW's X1 XDrive.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Land Rover Special
programme.desc: The Land Rover Defender is one of the oldest offroad car models. We took a look at this iconic vehicle and 70 years of Land Rover history. Also: we took the Range Rover Evoque, the most recent model of the British brand, to the legendary Silk Road.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E47 Close to the ground
programme.desc: In their 4 series BMW took into account that sporty vehicles need a low center of gravity. In the manufacturer's range of vehicles this model is closest to the asphalt. We compared the BMW 435i and Porsche's Cayman S and took a look at the Alfa Romeo 4C.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E49 Athletes on stilts - Power SUVs
programme.desc: Since the rising popularity of SUVs compact models have become a new trend, so the manufacturers started offering more models and pushing their performance. We took a look at the competitors Audi RS Q3, Mercedes-AMG GLA 45 and Porsche Macan Turbo.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Stereotypes on Two Wheels
programme.desc: Scooters, stereotypes on two wheels? It doesn't always have to be a classic Vespa! We take a look at three alternatives: Kymco's big scooter xciting 500 i that feels like riding on a sofa, Piaggio's three-wheeler MP3 500 with two front wheels that promises more dynamic driving pleasure and the powerful electric scooter e-max from China.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 Trikes
programme.desc: Whether taking it easy and cruising, or firing it up and drifting - trikes, scooters and three-wheeled bike conversions all have their own charm and driving dynamics, especially the trikes. We take a closer look at four rather exotic motorcycles: the Rewaco RF1 Turbo, Piaggio's MP3 and bike conversions for the Suzuki 800 Intruder and the Triumph Rocket III Touring.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Fiat Dino
programme.desc: The Fiat Dino Spider is one of the most beautiful cabriolets of the 1960s. Its impeccable design was created by Pininfarina, and only 525 units were built. Under its hood growls a Ferrari V6 engine.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E45 50 Years Corvette Stingray
programme.desc: 1963 saw the launch of the Chevrolet Corvette Stingray, the brand's answer to established sports car models by Jaguar, Maserati and others. Many consider it to be the most exciting sports car of all time. We pay tribute to this classic.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E79 Classic Technology Carriers
programme.desc: We followed the restoration of the unique Bayer K67 research vehicle, the first all-plastic car in the world, developed in 1967 by the pharmaceutical giant Bayer.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E78 Iconic Racing Classics
programme.desc: Cars like the Ford GT 40, the Jaguar D-Type or the Mercedes 300 SL wrote history on the race track and now break records at auctions. A sumptuously restored 300 SL will start at the most famous classic car rally in the world, the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Cruising
programme.desc: We explored how the Z4 Roadster feels as a cabriolet. Also: the small company Boom Trikes Automotive have become Europe's leading trike manufacturer. And: cruising through Los Angeles in a Volkswagen Beetle convertible.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E29 Diesel Engines
programme.desc: It's all about Diesel this time. We compared the BMW 120d and the 125i. In addition: Audi's diesel-hybrid model R18 e-tron quattro dominated the endurance race in Le Mans. And: the diesel-powered Jaguar XF Sport Brake.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E96 Red Bull Show Run
programme.desc: Red Bull takes a Formula One car on a city tour to promote the New Jersey Grand Prix. Also: Bentley proves that a V8 engine can also set elegant accents. And: McLaren presents the MP4-12 C Spider.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E81 Porsche Cayman R
programme.desc: Not only Porsche fans will like the sportiest Cayman model. Also: with the Juke-R, Nissan combined a GT-R sports car and a crossover. And: the BMW G-Power is the fastest station wagon on this planet.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Graduate
programme.desc: A vehicle jumps at full speed over four cars, which explode one after the other. It’s a matter of precision and timing for the Stunt Heroes. Also, up-and-coming stuntwoman Tina has to prove her skills.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Very First Time
programme.desc: The team is shooting a car rollover. Stunt coordinator Carl wants to go all out. He adds an exciting shootout to the mix. Also, he has a surprise for his boss. During the rollover he wants him to sit in the passenger seat, for the very first time.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Episode 15
programme.desc: We present the highlights of last week. The 24 hour race was exciting, as usual. In addition, we explored the 'Strong Man Run' and took a look at the tourist drivers

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Episode 19
programme.desc: The roaring sounds of engines and exhausts usually dominate the Nuerburgring, but we focused on something a bit quieter this time. How about taking part in a 15 mile bike ride around the ring, or perhaps a 16 mile run?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S03 : E193 Open Air Feeling
programme.desc: The Mercedes-AMG C43 was supposed to act as the entry-level model to the brand's cabriolet world. With the 718 Boxster, Porsche offers a convertible at a competitive price as well.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E109 Hot Supercars
programme.desc: Aston Martin V8 Vantage, Porsche 918 Spyder, Bentley Mulsanne, Audi R8 V10 or Bugatti Veyron Grand Sport Super Vitesse. These cars aren't really comparable as each vehicle is unique in its elegance and performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E84 Kelleners KS1 RS
programme.desc: The BMW One M Coupe from the former race-driver Ralf Kelleners: the KS1 RS is one of the highlights in 2012. Also: another big score from Porsche, the beautiful 911 cabriolet. And: the Bentley Continental GT V8 is a dream car.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Enduro Park Hechlingen
programme.desc: The BMW Enduro Park Hechlingen in Bavaria offers off-road driving pleasure both for beginners and pros alike on 26 hectares. We take a look at what this exciting place has to offer for enduro enthusiasts. Also: what does the inexpensive Hyosung ST 700 i from South Korea have to offer? And: the big-wheeled scooter from Taiwan, the Kymco People GT 300i.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Triumph Thunderbird
programme.desc: The parallel twin-cylinder Triumph Thunderbird. Is the powerful 1.6 litre bike able to gain a foothold outside of the British Isles? Also: Harley-Davidson's black chopper Sportster 883 Iron, a starter bike for purists. And: Bike & Music, a spectacle for motorbike and stunt enthusiasts at Europe's biggest motorway rest area in Geiselwind, Germany.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Episode 19
programme.desc: The roaring sounds of engines and exhausts usually dominate the Nuerburgring, but we focused on something a bit quieter this time. How about taking part in a 15 mile bike ride around the ring, or perhaps a 16 mile run?

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Episode 14
programme.desc: The fourth race of the VLN season is usually regarded as a dress rehearsal for the 24-hour race. For the top teams and best drivers it is the last opportunity for a really thorough test.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Scrapyard Gold
programme.desc: It is not too unusual to find hidden gems of automotive history in a perfect condition in barns or scrap yards. Also: the MGC GT Sebring, that was built for the 12 Hours of Sebring race.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E71 Mobility in Eastern Europe
programme.desc: In the 1950s, companies like Tatra from Czechoslovakia introduced advanced, even pioneering automobiles. The clientele was exclusive, which is why now these streamlined cars are big rarities. We tracked down the owner of a 1937 Tatra T87.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E51 Open Air Concert
programme.desc: As an homage to driving top-down we took a look at three of the most beautiful convertibles. The animalistic sound of the Audi S3 convertible's 4-cylinder is astonishing. But what about the Nissan 370 Z Roadster? Or Porsche's Boxster GTS?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Topless on the road
programme.desc: Convertibles suggest to the feeling of freedom while driving a car. We took a look at what Opel's Cascada and Adam convertible models had to offer. Also: what does the BMW 3 series Gran Turismo have in common with its bigger brother from the 5 series?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E124 Special: 24h of Le Mans - Track Days
programme.desc: Two weeks before the start of the 24 hours of Le Mans, all teams are busy testing their cars on the traditional long distance track in France. Bad weather, accidents and a lot of tension, we documented the official test days in 2013.

programme.title: FailArmy Playlist
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 FailArmy Playlist | Wasted Times
programme.desc: Hits on this playlist include "You Hit the Spot," "Let It Whip" and "Ghost Town."

programme.desc: Hits on this playlist include "Champagne Problems," "Festival Time" and "Falling."

programme.desc: Hits on this playlist include "Catch Me I'm Falling," "Filth Friends Unite" and "Ask Any Farmer."

programme.desc: From carnivals to campgrounds, the great outdoors loves a good fail.

programme.desc: Lifting, parkour, wrestling, and obstacle courses are boasting feats of strength in a fight for the Fail Cup!

programme.desc: We’ve got the best of the best in this Fail Cup highlight reel featuring the top 50 fails of the season!

programme.desc: Team sports basketball, football, hockey, and softball duke it out for a coveted spot in the Fail Cup finals.

programme.desc: Fasten your seatbelts! Bikes, skateboards, rollerblades and ATVs are rolling their way through this epic game.

programme.desc: Hope you left room for the full spectrum of fail flavors.

programme.desc: We’re hitting the road and watching the fails race by in cars vs trucks and looking for our FAIL champion.

programme.title: FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50 | Dog vs. Animal Kingdom
programme.desc: We pit the entire animal kingdom against man's best friend to see who our reigning fail champion will be!

programme.title: FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50 | Sports vs. CCTV
programme.desc: Athletes train and prepare while others are off the cuff and get caught on camera, but who fails harder?

programme.title: FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 FAILARMY: 50 VS. 50 | Superheroes vs. Spells
programme.desc: Find out which of these legendary categories is more failure prone: mighty superheroes or mysterious spells.

programme.title: FailFactory

programme.title: Best of Monster Jam
programme.sub-title: S2026 : E04 Epic Moments From Megalodon Driver Ashley Sanford Compilation
programme.desc: Hold onto your seats as Ashley Sanford takes the wheel of Megalodon for a series of high-stakes performances across Charlotte, OKC, and Wichita. The intensity reaches a fever pitch as she battles to secure her first BKT overall event Championship win of the year, pushing the iconic shark-themed truck to its absolute limit. Witness technical mastery in the Skills competition with incredible "stoppies" and "nose walks" before diving into a freestyle frenzy featuring the legendary Morgan and Morgan backflip. From surviving a wild side-roll to launching into massive "sky wheelies," this episode captures every heart-stopping second of a driver on the hunt for glory.

programme.sub-title: S2026 : E05 2026 Monster Jam Lineup Compilation
programme.desc: The 2026 season kicks off with an electric atmosphere as the world’s most elite drivers descend upon Brooklyn and Tampa for a showcase of raw power and technical brilliance. Witness the intensity reach a fever pitch during the first "father and son" Racing matchup of the year, where family ties are set aside in the pursuit of the next round. Competitors push their machines past the breaking point in Freestyle, featuring high-stakes maneuvers like the Morgan & Morgan backflip and a spectacular "Maximum moonwalk" performed from never-before-seen angles. With hoods flying and trucks performing impossible cartwheels to save their runs, this episode captures every heart-stopping moment of a lineup coming out "swinging with a ton more energy".

Racing, skills, and freestyle runs collide as rivalries heat up and the leaderboard stays in constant motion, with massive air, hard landings, and razor-thin margins separating the field. With no room for mistakes, this episode delivers nonstop Monster Jam spectacle and sets the tone for an unforgettable stretch of competition.

programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 Z Nation
programme.desc: 10K and Red attend a ceremony for those lost in Altura. Warren, Doc, Citizen Z and George arrive in Pacifica.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 Z Nation
programme.desc: A new spate of terrorist bombings hit Pacifica. In order to follow his vision for human-talker unity, George seeks those responsible for the attacks.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and the group wind up at a wild casino and shelter for fugitive talkers run by Murphy and his blends.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 Z Nation
programme.desc: Doc breaks out special medicine to treat George's injury and explains the Founding Fathers, the Bill of Rights and more.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E09 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group is reunited with old Native friends who are defending a dam that controls Newmerica's water from talkers. In order to help, Doc and Warren undertake spiritual journeys.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group discovers Altura militia forces have enslaved talkers to mine hazardous waste for Z-bizkuits.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E11 Z Nation
programme.desc: With help from renegade hackers, Warren and George hack Altura's defenses and discover Estes' secret plan.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E12 Z Nation
programme.desc: Estes imprisons the captive talkers and blends, while Warren and George plan their attack on Altura.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.sub-title: S05 : E08 Z Nation
programme.desc: The group arrives at the farming outpost that produces flour for Z-bizkuits, but it is overrun by zombies, Pandora and starving talkers laying in wait to kill them.
